narrative: Strait of Hormuz disruption fears drive crude toward $100, introducing a geopolitical risk premium as WTI firms +1.47%; gold lower -0.34%; equities +0.19%; DXY +0.21%; VIX 18.4. USD/JPY bids to 157.45 on a 300bp Fed-BoJ carry advantage, though BoJ summary hawkishness and US-Japan currency cooperation headlines cap the move. USD/CHF firms to 0.7798 as the 375bp spread sustains the bid despite rising Middle East tensions. Watch US CPI tomorrow for the next directional catalyst.
